data.title: ANI Pharmaceuticals Announces the FDA Approval and Launch of Pimozide Tablets with 180 Day CGT Exclusivity
data.description: ANI Pharmaceuticals, Inc., headquartered in Princeton, New Jersey, revealed on April 20, 2026, the introduction of Pimozide Tablets in two strengths - 1 mg and 2 mg. The tablets, generic versions of the RLD Orap®, have been launched by ANI under the Nasdaq symbol ANIP.

data.title: Evidence Supporting Combined Use of Deucrictibant IR with Deucrictibant XR Presented at CIIC Spring 2026 Conference
data.description: In Zug, Switzerland on April 20, 2026, Pharvaris, traded on Nasdaq as PHVS, a company in the later stages of biopharmaceutical development, is working on innovative oral medications known as bradykinin B2 receptor antagonists. These drugs are aimed at meeting the needs of individuals affected by bradykinin-mediated conditions like hereditary angioedema (HAE) and acquired angioedema due to C1 inhibitor deficiency (AAE-C1INH). At the Consortium of Independent Immunology Clinics (CIIC) Spring 2026 Conference held in Arlington, TX from April 17-19, 2026, Pharvaris shared findings on the safety profiles of administering deucrictibant immediate-release (IR) capsules alongside deucrictibant extended-release (XR) tablets. This research is crucial for understanding the compatibility and possible benefits of combining these forms of medication for patients.

data.title: Step inside Efficient, Healthy, Sustainable Buildings at the 2026 Passive House Network Conference
data.description: The Passive House Network Conference is set to take place on June 4th and 5th at Hotel Marcel in New Haven, Connecticut. This event will bring together building science experts from various countries to highlight the significance of Passive House as the leading standard for building performance. Scheduled for June 4th and 5th, the conference will serve as a platform for sharing knowledge and innovations.

data.title: CEO attributes Vercel breach to ‘Highly Sophisticated’ AI-powered hackers, resulting in compromising some customer credentials of the cloud platform, popular among numerous crypto frontends.
data.description: The security breach exposed a portion of customer credentials on the cloud platform. This platform serves as the hosting service for numerous crypto frontends to showcase their user interface.

data.description: In an update on the food certification market released by Persistence Market Research on April 20, 2026, it was revealed that these services are crucial for validating food safety, quality, and compliance standards. data.title: IGT Appoints Mark Wadley Incoming President of Land-Based Gaming
data.description: Mark Wadley has recently been appointed as IGT's upcoming President of Land-Based Gaming, effective April 20, 2026. The integration will cover various functions including product development, commercial strategies, and operational management. This move aims to lead a comprehensive gaming business approach.

data.title: Continuous Composites Expands Manufacturing Footprint to Support Production-Relevant CF3D Systems
data.description: Continuous Composites has recently revealed that it will be moving its operations to a larger facility located at 3875 N Schreiber Way, Coeur d'Alene, Idaho. The new facility spans over 17,000 square feet, indicating a significant increase compared to their previous manufacturing space. This move marks a major expansion for the company, allowing them to bolster their production capacity and resources significantly.

data.title: B2Gold Announces Agreement to Sell its 70% Interest in Fingold Joint Venture to Agnico Eagle for US$325 million; B2Gold and Agnico Eagle to Enter into Nunavut Collaboration Agreement
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 20, 2026, B2Gold Corp. (TSX: BTO, NYSE AMERICAN: BTG, NSX: B2G) announced a significant transaction. The company has finalized a deal with Agnico Eagle Mines Limited to sell its 70% stake in Fingold Ventures Ltd. for a total of US$325 million in cash. This agreement also includes the establishment of a collaboration agreement named the Nunavut Collaboration Agreement, focusing on their gold mining operations in Nunavut, Canada.

data.title: New International Banks Join Wallbox’s Financial Restructuring Plan
data.description: Wallbox N.V. (NYSE: WBX), a leading global provider of electric vehicle charging and energy management solutions, has successfully finalized its creditor accession process for the financial restructuring plan. Key creditors such as HSBC and Citibank have joined the plan, signaling widespread support from the financial sector. This development highlights the confidence in the Company's viability and strategic direction.

data.title: Ammonia Market worth $102.74 billion by 2031 - Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on April 20, 2026, a report by MarketsandMarkets highlighted the global forecast for the Ammonia Market. The market is segmented by type into Anhydrous and Aqueous, with sales channels including Direct and Indirect. Major end-use industries for ammonia include Agriculture, Textile, Refrigeration, Mining, and Pharmaceutical sectors. The forecast extends until 2031, with significant growth potential projected for the market.

data.title: Shareholder Alert: Ademi LLP investigates whether TopBuild Corp. is obtaining a Fair Price for Public Shareholders
data.description: An investigation into TopBuild (NYSE: BLD) is being conducted by Ademi LLP based in Milwaukee, starting April 20, 2026. The probe aims to uncover potential breaches of fiduciary duty and other legal violations in the company's recent deal with QXO. Those interested in participating in the investigation and seeking further details can find more information by clicking on the specified link.
